description: Example chemical incompatibility constraint rules for the Constraint Port.

rules.rule_label: PMMA to aged asphalt without approved separator or primer — chemical incompatibility
rules.source_ref: Chemical interaction matrix — PMMA / bituminous compounds

trigger.condition: material_a_type == 'PMMA_liquid_applied' AND material_b_type == 'bituminous_asphalt' AND substrate_age_years > 5 AND interlay_separator == false AND approved_primer == false

rules.notes: Plasticizer migration from aged asphalt chemically degrades PMMA cure. Mandatory separator or approved primer required.

rules.rule_label: PVC membrane contact with polystyrene insulation without barrier

trigger.condition: material_a_type == 'PVC_membrane' AND material_b_type IN ['EPS_insulation', 'XPS_insulation'] AND barrier_sheet_present == false

rules.notes: PVC plasticizers react with polystyrene, causing brittleness and membrane failure. Barrier sheet mandatory.
